audit_items.proof_trace: At line 442, `bid()` calls `_getAssetOutAmount(assetParams, assetPrice, amount, elapsedTime, true)` with the literal `true` hardcoded as the `withValidation` argument. This value is propagated to `_getAssetPrice(s_assetOut, withValidation)` at line 798, ensuring stale/zero oracle prices are rejected for both the assetIn (line 429, also `true`) and assetOut legs. The only call using `false` is the view-only estimation function `getAssetOutAmount()` (line 766), which is intentionally lenient and not involved in settlement.
